cours_court: Pour présenter une personne, on donne son nom, son âge ou sa date de naissance, sa nationalité et son métier.
On utilise he pour un homme, she pour une femme.
On peut ajouter une opinion : I think this person is important because...
Une bonne présentation utilise des phrases simples mais complètes.

questions.question: Écris une phrase pour dire qu'une personne est courageuse.
questions.correction: He is brave. / She is brave.

questions.question: Quelle phrase donne une opinion correcte ?
choix: I think she is important because she helped people.
questions.correction: La phrase correcte est : I think she is important because she helped people.

questions.question: Présente un personnage célèbre en trois phrases.
questions.correction: Exemple : Her name is Marie Curie. She was a scientist. I think she is important because she discovered radioactivity.

questions.question: Présente un personnage célèbre en anglais.
questions.correction_minimale: Her name is Marie Curie. She was a scientist.
questions.correction_correcte: Her name is Marie Curie. She was a Polish and French scientist. She is famous because she worked on radioactivity.
questions.correction_complete: Her name is Marie Curie. She was a Polish and French scientist. She is famous because she worked on radioactivity and received two Nobel Prizes. I think she is important because her discoveries changed science.
